_meta.validation: §6.5 fresh-context agent fan-out: one fresh agent per query, given only the anonymized description + that single query, pure relevance question, verdicts adjudicated from reasoning (results archived alongside in results-2026-07-15.json).

evals.query: my follower mod's companion has zero perks — what should she actually carry in Requiem?
evals.note: core: derive a perk set for a modded NPC

evals.query: this custom boss dies way too easily, he only has vanilla Armsman ranks — give him a proper Requiem perk setup
which perks should a modded warlock that casts fireball and frost cloak carry in requiem
evals.note: caster derivation from spell kit, lowercase casual

evals.query: go through the perk records that Vigilant.esp ships and figure out what to do with each of them for Requiem
the archer NPCs from this bandit mod need perk loadouts derived from their gear
do I need to give this NPC the armor penetration perks or does the Reqtificator add those at build?
my spellsword follower needs the right mix of one-handed and destruction perks for Requiem
this mod ships a custom perk giving 30% more smithing yield — does that clash with Requiem's crafting gates?
give the draugr variants in my dungeon mod the right requiem perks
patching a knight NPC — greatsword, heavy armor, shield on his back. build his perk list
patch this follower mod's NPC for Requiem — level, class, factions, outfit, the works
evals.note: near-miss: whole-NPC frame -> requiem-npc-patching (perks are one lane of it)

evals.query: design a new perk tree for my crafting overhaul mod, balanced against Requiem smithing
evals.note: near-miss: authoring new PERK records/trees — this skill never authors PERKs

evals.query: use SPID to hand out a perk to every bandit in my load order
what perks should I take for a Requiem stealth archer playthrough?
evals.note: near-miss: player build advice, not patch authoring

evals.query: my new spell needs its HalfCostPerk pointed at the right Requiem school tier perk
evals.note: tricky near-miss: a perk link, but it's spell tier classification -> requiem-magic-patching

evals.query: rebalance this modded spell's magicka cost and magnitude for Requiem
my custom race needs its racial abilities and damage resistances set up for Requiem
evals.note: near-miss: racial traits live on the RACE -> requiem-race-patching (trait perks are the Reqtificator's lane)

evals.query: write a SkyPatcher ini that adds a perk to every guard
evals.note: near-miss: perk + NPCs, but runtime ini patching -> skypatcher-authoring

evals.query: this enemy never blocks even with a shield equipped, fix whatever drives that
the perk descriptions from my mod render with broken tags in the skill menu, fix the strings
evals.note: near-miss: PERK records but cosmetic string fix, no Requiem balance
